query:
SELECT
            COALESCE(NULLIF(device_type, ''), 'Unknown') AS "device!",
            COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "sessions!"
        FROM user_sessions
        WHERE started_at >= NOW() - $1::text::interval
          AND NOT is_bot AND NOT is_scanner
          AND NOT COALESCE(is_behavioral_bot, false)
          AND request_count > 0
        GROUP BY 1
        ORDER BY 2 DESC
        LIMIT 10
